release.commit_message:
ci(docker): point anime image at gated warning source

Update the archived image metadata to build from the pushed source commit containing the modal-style warning and five-close snooze gate.

Constraint: Docker builds fetch source archives by remote commit SHA, so meta.json must follow the pushed source branch.

Rejected: Wait for scheduled update | this push should immediately make the release branch represent the intended image source.

Confidence: high

Scope-risk: narrow

Directive: Re-run update-versions.sh after any final source warning changes before archiving the image repo.

Tested: jq meta.json parse; Ruby YAML parse for workflows; bash -n scripts; metadata commands match current values; GitHub source archive HEAD resolves; git diff --check.

Not-tested: Full Docker image build and GHCR smoke test locally.
